name: Performance - High Load on /api/assistant/message Endpoint
description: Measures the system's response time and error rate when handling a high volume of concurrent requests to the /api/assistant/message endpoint.
input: Simultaneous POST requests (e.g., 100-200) to /api/assistant/message with valid user_input payloads.
output: Aggregate metrics: average response time, maximum response time, error rate.
success_criteria: Average response time is below 2 seconds
